com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXDeviceConnector

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXAbstractConnector, IXAbstractPinList, IXConnectivityObject, IXLibrariedObject, IXObject, IXPinList<IXAbstractPin>, IXWriteableObject

    public interface IXDeviceConnector
extends IXAbstractConnector
    Interface for typing of a device connector.
